_comment: RYUJIN — Ryujin Keep (gym 8, Dragon) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 geometry VERBATIM so the camera path stays leader-agnostic and gym/engage_ryujin_leader still opens the battle from the endBack:7 stage-back. Structure mirrors leader_intro: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Ryujin, then a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to the face (the z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close hold), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. startTitle names them; the theme is DRAGON/RIFT — ender_dragon growl+flap and portal ambient sell the torn-rift Keeper, with dragon_breath then portal particles anchored ON the leader's body (this leader HAS a uuid, so particles land on them via `execute at <uuid>`, fixing Cicada's rough challenger-facing placement). The universal levelup swell closes at tick 190. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify + nudge the particle heights and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Ryujin Keep arena (leader floats over the rift stage). endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at 41d696fd-1824-4eaa-8b76-53f68095bafc run particle minecraft:dragon_breath ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at 41d696fd-1824-4eaa-8b76-53f68095bafc run particle minecraft:portal ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
